name: Tax-Free Partnership Property Distributions

eligibility.description: Partners in a partnership receiving distributions of property or cash that does not exceed their outside basis.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Generally, no gain is recognized by a partner upon a distribution of property (other than money) until the partner subsequently sells that property. Gain is only recognized if the money distributed exceeds the partner's adjusted basis in the partnership.
